accounts.name: borrower
docs: The borrower wallet that pays the yield

instructions.name: attach_encrypt_score
docs: Borrower registers a sha256 commitment of their Encrypt-sealed credit
score on-chain. The actual score data stays encrypted off-chain.

accounts.name: borrower
docs: The borrower must sign — only the named borrower can attach collateral to their loan.

accounts.name: ika_collateral
docs: Optional IKA collateral PDA.  If provided, must be in Locked state.
Pass SystemProgram when not using IKA collateral.

accounts.name: tranche_mint
docs: SPL mint for pTRANCHE token. Mint authority = tranche PDA.

accounts.name: loss_bucket
docs: Loss bucket token account, authority = vault PDA

accounts.name: vault_usdc_reserve
docs: Vault USDC reserve token account, authority = vault PDA

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault must be Defaulted before admin can liquidate collateral.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Anyone may trigger release once the loan is provably Repaid.

instructions.name: verify_encrypt_default
docs: Must be called as instruction index 1 in a tx where index 0 is an
ed25519 native-program instruction containing the Encrypt FHE oracle's
signature over the 73-byte attestation. Atomically proves default via
FHE attestation AND triggers the credit event cascade.

instructions.name: verify_ika_collateral
docs: Must be called as instruction index 1 in a tx where index 0 is an
ed25519 native-program instruction containing the oracle's signature.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Anyone may relay the oracle-signed attestation to the chain.

accounts.name: config
docs: Read oracle_allowlist to validate the signer's key.

instructions.name: record_cloak_payout
docs: Must be called as instruction index 1 in a tx where index 0 is an
Ed25519 native-program instruction containing the Cloak oracle's
signature over the 73-byte attestation. Records that yield was
shielded via Cloak's ZK batch disbursement system — LP payout amounts
become confidential while remaining auditable via viewing keys.

errors.name: VaultNotActive
errors.msg: Vault is not in Active state

errors.name: VaultPaused
errors.msg: Vault is paused

errors.name: InvalidTrancheKind
errors.msg: Invalid tranche kind

errors.name: LoanInWrongState
errors.msg: Loan is not in expected state

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Insufficient liquidity in tranche

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Slippage exceeded — swap output below min_amount_out

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized — caller is neither admin nor allowlisted oracle

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: EmptyTrancheNav
errors.msg: NAV calculation: division by zero (empty tranche)

errors.name: InvalidSeverity
errors.msg: CreditEvent severity exceeds 100% (10000 bps)

errors.name: LossExceedsTotalAssets
errors.msg: Loss amount exceeds total vault assets

errors.name: BorrowerMismatch
errors.msg: Borrower account mismatch

errors.name: TrancheWipedNoDepositsAllowed
errors.msg: Tranche has been wiped (NAV = 0); deposits blocked until reset

errors.name: OracleStale
errors.msg: Switchboard feed value is older than freshness threshold

errors.name: CollateralNotLocked
errors.msg: IKA collateral is not in Locked state; disbursement blocked

errors.name: OracleSignatureInvalid
errors.msg: Oracle signature invalid or message mismatch

errors.name: DwalletIdMismatch
errors.msg: dWallet ID in attestation does not match registered collateral

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: Collateral USD value is insufficient to cover loan principal

errors.name: CollateralAlreadyLocked
errors.msg: Collateral already locked; cannot re-verify

errors.name: OracleNotAllowlisted
errors.msg: Oracle public key is not in the global allowlist

errors.name: CollateralAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Collateral account is already active and cannot be re-attached

errors.name: EncryptAlreadyDefaultProven
errors.msg: Encrypt health is already DefaultProven; cannot re-prove

errors.name: EncryptSignatureInvalid
errors.msg: Encrypt oracle signature invalid or message mismatch

errors.name: EncryptCommitmentMismatch
errors.msg: score_commitment in attestation does not match registered commitment

errors.name: EncryptDefaultNotProven
errors.msg: Encrypt FHE result byte is not 0x01 (default not proven by oracle)

errors.name: CloakPayoutAlreadyRecorded
errors.msg: Cloak payout already recorded for this vault epoch

errors.name: CloakSignatureInvalid
errors.msg: Cloak oracle signature invalid or message mismatch

errors.name: CloakBatchIdMismatch
errors.msg: batch_id in attestation does not match expected commitment

errors.name: CloakPayoutNotConfirmed
errors.msg: Cloak result byte is not 0x01 (batch not confirmed by oracle)

fields.name: loan
docs: The Loan PDA this collateral secures.

fields.name: dwallet_id
docs: IKA dWallet identifier (32-byte key on the IKA / dWallet Network).

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Chain where the real asset lives: 0 = BTC, 1 = ETH.

fields.name: collateral_amount_usd
docs: USD value of locked collateral in micro-USD (1 USD = 1_000_000).

fields.name: oracle_pubkey
docs: Ed25519 public key of the IKA oracle that must sign the attestation.

fields.name: locked_ts
docs: Unix timestamp when the oracle confirmed the lock (0 until Locked).
